title: Squire Locks Kilda Combi CN 6/900 Integrated Bicycle Lock & Chain – 4-Wheel Combination Bike Chain Lock – Tough Bike Lock Chain – 900 mm Locking Length – 6 mm Diameter Hardened Steel Links
features: Squire Locks Kilda Combi CN 6/900 Integrated Bicycle Lock & Chain – 4-Wheel Combination Bike Chain Lock – Tough Bike Lock Chain – 900 mm Locking Length – 6 mm Diameter Hardened Steel Links

TOUGH INTEGRATED COMBINATION LIGHTWEIGHT BIKE CHAIN LOCK: The Kilda Combi CN 6/900 bicycle chain lock from Squire Locks consists of a 900 mm long hardened steel chain with an integrated anti-theft 4-wheel combination lock body. The 6 mm diameter chain features a protective chain cover that helps against scratches and abrasions. The Kilda Combi CN 6/900 weighs 0.6 kg, making it practical and easy to transport even when not in use.

TOUGH SECURITY BIKE LOCK: The Squire Kilda Combi CN 6/900 bike lock provides hassle-free, tough security for bicycles. Made from hardened steel, this lightweight cycle lock features a fully re-codable, integrated 4-wheel combination lock body with 10,000 possible combinations, an essential bike accessory for all cyclists.

WEATHERPROOF AND DURABLE: Made from hardened steel, this lightweight chain lock is highly effective in harsh weather conditions. The integrated combination lock body and protective cover provides high resilience against the elements ensuring long lasting protection and durability

MULTIPURPOSE AND EASY TO USE: The lightweight and portable design of the Kilda Combi CN 6/900 bike lock ensures easy to use, tough security. Use this combination cycle lock to easily secure bikes to fences, gates, bike racks and lamp posts. The Kilda Combi CN 6/900 bike chain lock is also available in a keyed lock version.
